title: LURE: Alignment Evaluations to Reduce Evaluation Awareness
summary: LURE: Alignment Evaluations to Reduce Evaluation Awareness
whyItMatters: TLDR: Frontier models can detect when they're being evaluated and change their behavior, which risks compromising safety benchmarks. We introduce LURE (Live-Usage Replay Evaluations), a method that constructs alignment evals by replaying realistic conversations and appending a safety-relevant test at the end, rather than building evaluation scenarios from s…
